hooks.command: command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' 2>/dev/null | { read -r f; case "$f" in (*.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx|*.json|*.yml|*.yaml|*.md|*.markdown|*.css|*.scss|*.less|*.html|*.htm|*.cjs|*.mjs) npx --no-install prettier --write "$f" ;; (*) : ;; esac; } || true

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '(^|/)\.env' && ! echo "$file" | grep -qE '(^|/)\.env\.example'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Cannot write to .env files directly. Use .env.example for templates."}}'; fi
